config.script:
'class CExcel #include "50201" #include "50212" #include "50203" #include "50519"
'tablica przechowująca parametry tworzonego eksportu dim g_oParamArray : set g_oParamArray = nothing
'1 - przed 2013 r. '2 - 2013 r. '3 - 2014 r. dim iRaportVersion : iRaportVersion = 1
dim pFSO: set pFSO=CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
sub safe_delete_file(byval strFileName) on error resume next pFSO.DeleteFile strFileName,true on error goto 0 end sub '----------------------------- ' funkcja inicjująca eksport '----------------------------- function fopen() 'trans_.var(102)=1
iRaportVersion = trans_.var(101)
fopen = facquireparam() if not fopen then exit function end if
dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Eksport danych do SAP...")
NX_TRACE_START_STREAM("Eksport danych do SAP",nothing)
'rozpocznij ekport dokumentów sprzedaży export_dok_do_SAP
set pPerf = nothing
NX_TRACE_SHOW_LOG(1) fopen = false end function
'--------------------------------------------------- ' funkcja tworząca parametry wykonywanego eksportu '--------------------------------------------------- dim pRaportMomentParam function get_default_param() dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()
if iRaportVersion = 3 then set pRaportMomentParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date("Analizowany moment").bindexpr("") pParamArray.add pRaportMomentParam else dim oZakresDatParam : set oZakresDatParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date_range("Data wystawienia").bindexpr("%DATADOK%") pParamArray.add oZakresDatParam end if
pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Nazwa dostawcy").bindexpr("isnull(%DOSTNAZWA%,'')")
if iRaportVersion = 2 or iRaportVersion = 3 then pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Grupa klientów").bindexpr("isnull(%GRKLNAZWA%,'')") end if
set get_default_param = pParamArray end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------- ' funkcja otwierająca okno dialogowe wyboru parametrów eksportu '---------------------------------------------------------------- function facquireparam : facquireparam = false
dim pModRapEngine : set pModRapEngine = doc_.getmodule(60108) dim oParamArray : set oParamArray = get_default_param()
if trans_.isvar(102) then oParamArray.value(0).mode = PARAM_DATE_MODE_RANGE oParamArray.value(0).first_value = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) oParamArray.value(0).last_value = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)
oParamArray.value(1).mode = PARAM_TEXT_MODE_CONTAIN oParamArray.value(1).first_value = "brother"
oParamArray.value(2).mode = PARAM_TEXT_MODE_CONTAIN oParamArray.value(2).first_value = "brother" end if
if pModRapEngine.show_raport_param_dialog(oParamArray, "Parametry eksportu") = 0 then exit function end if
set g_oParamArray = oParamArray
'--- force generation of where parts in parameters g_oParamArray.Value(0).get_where_part trans_ g_oParamArray.Value(1).get_where_part trans_
dim strInfo : strInfo = _ vbLf + g_oParamArray.Value(0).get_desc() + _ vbLf + g_oParamArray.Value(1).get_desc()
facquireparam = true end function
'---------------------------------------- ' funkcja eksportu danych do pliku .xls '---------------------------------------- function export_dok_do_SAP() : export_dok_do_SAP = false
NX_TRACE_SUB_START("Eksport do SAP")
'ścieżka do pliku z eksportowanymi danymi dim strDestPath : strDestPath = getUserDirectory() + "\Eksport do SAP\" dim strDestPath2: strDestPath2 = "i:\"
Create_FileDriveObject
'tworzymy teraz katalog ale dla danego user'a i dokumentu if (not pFD.IsFolder( strDestPath )) then if (not pFD.CreatePath(strDestPath)) then exit function end if end if
if iRaportVersion = 2 or iRaportVersion = 3 then 'katalogi dla nowy i 2014 if iRaportVersion = 2 then strDestPath = strDestPath + "SELL\" else strDestPath = strDestPath + "STOCK\" end if if (not pFD.IsFolder( strDestPath )) then if (not pFD.CreatePath(strDestPath)) then exit function end if end if
if not doc_.getmodule(60253).gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(true) then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Nie udało się zaktualizować cen magazynowych. Sprawdź przyczynę za pomocą raportów magazynowych." exit function end if else strDestPath = strDestPath + "Sellout_Labelmarket_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + ".xls" end if
'zapytanie SQL pobierające dane do eksportu dim strSQL if iRaportVersion = 1 then strSQL = "select 's_ddatawyst'=s.p_ddatawyst,'s_strnrdok'=s.p_strNrDok,'k_strindeks'=k.strIndeks,'k_strnazwa'=k.strNazwa, " +_ "'p_strindeks'=p.strIndeks,'p_strnazwa'=p.strNazwa,'p_strindeks'=p.strIndeks,'s_curiloscopak'=s.c_curiloscopak, " +_ "'z_wartnetto'=isnull((s.c_curiloscopak * " +_ " (select top 1 z.c_curCenaNettoWal from vlist_n5zakup_listPozycje as z " +_ " inner join n5rejestrdok as r on z.p_pRejestrDok = r.idobj " +_ " inner join n5produkt as prod on z.c_pprodukt = prod.idobj " +_ " left outer join n5klient as dost on prod.prod_pDostawca = dost.idobj " +_ " where (r.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_WNT) and prod.strIndeks = p.strIndeks and " +_ " [%4] and z.p_ddatawyst <= [%5] " +_ " order by z.p_ddatawyst desc)),0), " +_ "'s_curwartnettoEUR'=isnull((s.c_curwartnetto / (select AVG(curSprzedWal) from n5kurswalut as k " +_ " inner join n5jednostka as jZ on k.pWalZ = jZ.idobj " +_ " inner join n5jednostka as jNa on k.pWalN = jNa.idobj " +_ " where jZ.strSkrot like '%EUS%' and jNa.strSkrot like '%PLN%' and " +_ " [%1])),0), " +_ "'k_strnazwa'=k.strNazwa,'k_adres'=k.strUlica + ' ' + k.strNrDomu, " +_ "'m_miasto'=m.strNazwa,'k_strkod'=k.strKod,'k_strnip'=k.strNIP,'kr_strskrot'=kr.strSkrot,'Dummy_Field'='*' " +_ "from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as s " +_ "inner join n5klient as k on s.p_pklient = k.idobj " +_ "inner join n5miejscowosc as m on k.pMiejscowosc = m.idobj " +_ "inner join n5kraj as kr on k.pKraj = kr.idobj " +_ "inner join n5produkt as p on s.c_pprodukt = p.idobj " +_ "left outer join n5klient as d on p.prod_pDostawca = d.idobj " +_ "where [%2] and [%3] " +_ "order by k.strNazwa, s.p_strnrdok"
dim strWhere1, strWhere2, strWhere3, strWhere4, strWhere5, strWhere6, strWhere7 strWhere1 = replace(g_oParamArray.Value(0).get_where_part(trans_),"%DATADOK%","dData") strWhere2 = replace(g_oParamArray.Value(0).get_where_part(trans_),"%DATADOK%","s.p_ddatawyst") strWhere3 = replace(g_oParamArray.Value(1).get_where_part(trans_),"%DOSTNAZWA%","d.strNazwa") strWhere4 = replace(g_oParamArray.Value(1).get_where_part(trans_),"%DOSTNAZWA%","dost.strNazwa") strWhere5 = trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(g_oParamArray.Value(0).last_value)
strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%1]",strWhere1) strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%2]",strWhere2) strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%3]",strWhere3) strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%4]",strWhere4) strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%5]",strWhere5)
elseif iRaportVersion = 2 then '26 - Euro '5 - EUR dim strSQL0 : strSQL0 = "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='labelmarket_export_sap_2013') " +_ "delete from dbo.labelmarket_export_sap_2013 " +_ "else " +_ "create table dbo.labelmarket_export_sap_2013 (" +_ "idobj_produkt integer, " +_ "idobj_sprzedaz integer, " +_ "produkt_indeks varchar(512)," +_ "produkt_nazwa varchar(512)," +_ "sprzed_ilosc decimal(14,4)," +_ "zakup_wart_netto decimal(14,4)," +_ "sprzed_wart_netto decimal(14,4)," +_ "sprzed_kurs decimal(14,4)," +_ "zakup_kurs decimal(14,4)," +_ "klient_nip varchar(512)," +_ "klient_nazw varchar(512)," +_ "klient_adres varchar(512)," +_ "klient_kod varchar(512)," +_ "klient_miasto varchar(512)," +_ "sprzed_datawyst datetime," +_ "egz_nr varchar(512)" +_ ")" trans_.execsql strSQL0
dim strSQL1 : strSQL1 = "insert into dbo.labelmarket_export_sap_2013 select prod.idobj, vlsp.p_idobj, prod.strIndeks, prod.strNazwa, vlsp.c_curiloscopak - isnull(vlsp_org.c_curiloscopak, 0)," +_ " isnull((select AVG(gmo_curcena) from n5gmop where gmo_pprod = vlsp.c_pprodukt and gmo_nNumOp = isnull((select top 1 nNumOper from n5dokmag where wrefdokhandl=vlsp.p_idobj order by nNumOper),0)), 0.0),"+_ " vlsp.c_curwartnetto - isnull(vlsp_org.c_curwartnetto, 0),"+_ " case vlsp.p_pwaluta when 26 then 1.0 else " +_ " isnull((select curSprzedWal from n5kurswalut where idobj = (select top 1 idobj from n5kurswalut kw_ where kw_.pWaln = vlsp.p_pwaluta " +_ " and kw_.pWalz = 26 and kw_.dData <= vlsp.p_dDatawyst order by kw_.dData desc)), 0.0) " +_ " end, " +_ " case vlsp.p_pwaluta when 26 then 1.0 else " +_ " isnull((select curSprzedWal from n5kurswalut where idobj = (select top 1 idobj from n5kurswalut kw_ where kw_.pWaln = vlsp.p_pwaluta " +_ " and kw_.pWalz = 26 and kw_.dData < isnull((select top 1 dDataWyst from n5dokmag where wrefdokhandl=vlsp.p_idobj order by nNumOper), '2005-01-01') order by kw_.dData desc)), 0.0) " +_ " end, " +_ " k.strNIP, k.strNazwa, k.strUlica + ' ' + k.strNrDomu, k.strKod, m.strNazwa, vlsp.p_dDatawyst, "+_ " isnull((select top 1 egz.egze_strNrSeryjny from n5egzemplarz egz join vlist_n5dokmag_dm_listEgzemplarze vldmeg on egz.idobj = vldmeg.c_pdmeg_pegz "+_ " where egz.egze_pProdukt = vlsp.c_pprodukt and vldmeg.p_wrefdokhandl=vlsp.p_idobj and vldmeg.p_wrefdokhandl_wrt=10129 order by vldmeg.coll_lp),'') " +_ " from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as vlsp "+_ " left outer join vlist_n5sprzedaz_listpozycje vlsp_org on vlsp.p_ppopsprzed = vlsp_org.p_idobj and vlsp.coll_lp = vlsp_org.coll_lp "+_ " inner join n5produkt as prod on vlsp.c_pprodukt = prod.idobj " +_ " inner join n5klient as k on vlsp.p_pklient = k.idobj " +_ " inner join n5grupaklient as grk on k.pGrupaKlient = grk.idobj " +_ " inner join n5miejscowosc as m on k.pMiejscowosc = m.idobj "+_ " where vlsp.p_prejestrdok not in (select IdObj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA)) and [%1] "
strSQL1 = replace(strSQL1, "[%1]", replace(g_oParamArray.Value(0).get_where_part(trans_), "%DATADOK%", "vlsp.p_ddatawyst"))
if g_oParamArray.Value(1).mode <> PARAM_TEXT_MODE_ANY_TEXT then strSQL1 = strSQL1 + replace(" and vlsp.c_pprodukt in (select idobj from n5produkt where prod_pDostawca in (select idobj from n5klient as dostawca where [%A] )) ",_ "[%A]", replace(g_oParamArray.Value(1).get_where_part(trans_),"%DOSTNAZWA%", "dostawca.strNazwa")) end if
strSQL1 = strSQL1 + " and " + replace(g_oParamArray.Value(2).get_where_part(trans_), "%GRKLNAZWA%", "grk.strNazwa")
trans_.execsql strSQL1 trans_.execsql "commit"
strSQL = "select produkt_indeks, produkt_nazwa, sprzed_ilosc, zakup_wart_netto, sprzed_wart_netto, sprzed_kurs, zakup_kurs, " +_ " klient_nip, klient_nazw, klient_adres, klient_kod, klient_miasto, sprzed_datawyst, egz_nr from dbo.labelmarket_export_sap_2013 order by klient_nazw, sprzed_datawyst"
else 'rok 2014 strSQL = "select * from " + vbNewLine +_ "(select 'produkt_indeks'=max(prod.p_strindeks), 'produkt_nazwa'=max(prod.p_strnazwa), " + vbNewLine +_ "'ilosc_magazyn' = isnull(sum(t_0.gmo_curIlosc),0), " + vbNewLine +_ "'ilosc_zam_wlasne'=(select isnull(sum(c_curiloscopakpoz),0) from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje zam " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5rejestrdok r on zam.p_prejestrdok = r.idObj " + vbNewLine +_ "where r.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE and c_pprodukt = prod.p_idobj and c_popak = prod.c_idobj), " + vbNewLine +_ "'ilosc_zam_obce'=(select isnull(sum(c_curiloscopakpoz),0) from vlist_n5zamowienie_listPozycje zam " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5rejestrdok r on zam.p_prejestrdok = r.idObj " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5klient as k on zam.p_pklient = k.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " inner join n5grupaklient as grk on k.pGrupaKlient = grk.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " where r.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE and c_pprodukt = prod.p_idobj and c_popak = prod.c_idobj " + vbNewLine +_ " and [%3]) " + vbNewLine +_ "from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania as prod " + vbNewLine +_ "left join n5gmop as t_0 on prod.p_idobj = t_0.gmo_pProd and prod.c_idobj = t_0.gmo_pOpak " + vbNewLine +_ "where t_0.gmo_pMag in (select IdObj from n5magazyn where eTyp in (N5TYPMAG_PODSTAWOWY,N5TYPMAG_REZERWACJE)) and (prod.p_eAktywny = N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY) and prod.p_erodzaj = N5PRODUKT_TOWAR and NUMOPBORDER and [%2] " + vbNewLine +_ "group by prod.p_idobj,prod.c_idobj) as pom " + vbNewLine +_ "where pom.ilosc_magazyn > 0 or pom.ilosc_zam_obce > 0 or pom.ilosc_zam_wlasne > 0 " + vbNewLine +_ "order by pom.produkt_nazwa,pom.produkt_indeks"
dim nDummy strSQL = replace(strSQL,"NUMOPBORDER","t_0.gmo_nNumOp " + doc_.getmodule(43025).rap_param_date_2_gm_num_oper_where(pRaportMomentParam,nDummy))
strSQL = replace(strSQL, "[%1]", replace(g_oParamArray.Value(0).get_where_part(trans_), "%DATADOK%", "vlsp.p_ddatawyst"))
if g_oParamArray.Value(1).mode <> PARAM_TEXT_MODE_ANY_TEXT then strSQL = replace(strSQL,"and [%2]",replace(vbNewLine + " and prod.p_idobj in (select idobj from n5produkt where prod_pDostawca in (select idobj from n5klient as dostawca where [%A] )) ",_ "[%A]", replace(g_oParamArray.Value(1).get_where_part(trans_),"%DOSTNAZWA%", "dostawca.strNazwa"))) else strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%2]","(1=1)") end if
strSQL = replace(strSQL,"[%3]",replace(g_oParamArray.Value(2).get_where_part(trans_), "%GRKLNAZWA%", "grk.strNazwa")) end if
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL)
if iRaportVersion = 1 then dim pExcel : set pExcel = new CExcel
if (not pExcel.NewExcel()) then exit function end if
'naglowek pliku .xls naglowekPliku(pExcel) 'zaczynamy od drugiego wiersza dim nrWiersza : nrWiersza = 2 else dim oSO : set oSO = doc_.createstreamobj() dim dtFirst if iRaportVersion = 3 then dtFirst = g_oParamArray.Value(0).first_value else dtFirst = g_oParamArray.Value(0).last_value end if dim strFileName
dim tCurTime: tCurTime = doc_.afc.convert.long2time(trans_.var(GVAR_SYSTIME)) if iRaportVersion = 2 then strFileName="BPL_DKD_LABE_" + cstr(year(dtFirst)) + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Month(dtFirst),2) + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Day(dtFirst), 2) + "_" + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Hour(tCurTime), 2) + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Minute(tCurTime), 2) + ".txt" else strFileName="BPL_STOCKDATA_LABE_" + cstr(year(dtFirst)) + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Month(dtFirst),2) + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Day(dtFirst), 2) + "_" + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Hour(tCurTime), 2) + trans_.afc.convert.AddZeros(Minute(tCurTime), 2) + ".txt" end if
dim strTmpPath : strTmpPath = "c:\temp\e2b.ansi" dim strTmpPath2 : strTmpPath2 = "c:\temp\e2b.unicode"
strDestPath2 = strDestPath2 + strFileName strDestPath = strDestPath + strFileName
safe_delete_file strTmpPath safe_delete_file strTmpPath2
oSO.attach strTmpPath oSO.rewind
nrWiersza = 1 end if
'nagłówek 2014 if iRaportVersion = 3 then naglowek_2014_txt oSO end if
'zawartosc pliku .xls do while not oRS.EOF if iRaportVersion = 1 then if ccur(oRS("z_wartnetto"))<>0 then pojWiersz nrWiersza, oRS, pExcel end if else if iRaportVersion = 2 then pojWiersz_2013_txt nrWiersza, oRS, oSO else pojWiersz_2014_txt oRS, oSO end if end if nrWiersza = nrWiersza + 1 oRS.MoveNext loop
if iRaportVersion = 1 then pExcel.SetFileName strDestPath 'pExcel.MakeWholeFrame
pExcel.AutoFitWhole
pExcel.CloseExcel else
set oSO = nothing
trans_.message 0,0,"temp ansi=" + strTmpPath trans_.message 0,0,"temp unicode=" + strTmpPath2 trans_.message 0,0,"dest unicode=" + strDestPath trans_.message 0,0,"dest2 unicode=" + strDestPath2
doc_.system.execute "C:\Program Files\NAVO Enterprise 2015\System\ansi2unicode.exe", ".", strTmpPath + " " + strTmpPath2, true, true
pFSO.CopyFile strTmpPath2, strDestPath, true pFSO.CopyFile strDestPath, strDestPath2, true
end if
export_dok_do_SAP = true
NX_TRACE_END
end function
'----------------------------------- 'procedura tworząca nagłowek pliku '----------------------------------- sub naglowekPliku(byval pExcel)
pojElement pExcel,1,1,"Distributor Account No","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,2,1,"Invoice Date","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,3,1,"Account Sold to Number","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,4,1,"Account Sold to Name","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,5,1,"Account Sold to Key","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,6,1,"Disty Material Code","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,7,1,"Material Discription","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,8,1,"Brother Material Code","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,9,1,"Industry Standard Code","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,10,1,"Qty","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,11,1,"Cost Value","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,12,1,"Invoice Value","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,13,1,"Sell out Key","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,14,1,"Reseller Account Name","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,15,1,"Reseller Name 2","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,16,1,"Reseller Name 3","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,17,1,"Reseller Address 1","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,18,1,"Reseller Address 2","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,19,1,"Reseller Address 3","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,20,1,"Reseller Address 4","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,21,1,"Reseller Address 5","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,22,1,"Reseller City","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,23,1,"Reseller Region","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,24,1,"Reseller Post Code","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,25,1,"Reseller Country","red",true,11 pojElement pExcel,26,1,"Reseller Main Tel","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,27,1,"Reseller Main Fax","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,28,1,"Reseller Email","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,29,1,"Reseller Type","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,30,1,"Reseller Status","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,31,1,"Reseller Account Manager","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,32,1,"Reseller Sales Team","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,33,1,"Reseller VAT No","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,34,1,"Contact Prefix","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,35,1,"Contact Firstname","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,36,1,"Contact Lastname","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,37,1,"Contact email","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,38,1,"Contact Jobtitle","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,39,1,"Contact Status","blue",false,11 pojElement pExcel,40,1,"Dummy Field","red",true,11
end sub
'---------------------------------------------------- 'procedura tworzy pojedynczy wiersz z zapytania sql '---------------------------------------------------- sub pojWiersz(byval nrWiersza, byval oRS, byval pExcel)
pojElement pExcel,1,nrWiersza,"64087","black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,2,nrWiersza,conData(CStr(oRS("s_ddatawyst"))),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,3,nrWiersza,Replace(CStr(oRS("k_strnip")),"-",""),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,4,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("k_strnazwa")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,5,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("m_miasto")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,6,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("p_strindeks")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,7,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("p_strnazwa")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,8,nrWiersza,Replace(CStr(oRS("p_strindeks")),"-",""),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,10,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("s_curiloscopak")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,11,nrWiersza,doc_.afc.display.money(oRS("z_wartnetto"),""),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,12,nrWiersza,doc_.afc.display.money(oRS("s_curwartnettoEUR"),""),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,14,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("k_strnazwa")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,17,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("k_adres")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,22,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("m_miasto")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,23,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("k_strkod")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,24,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("k_strkod")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,25,nrWiersza,CStr(oRS("kr_strskrot")),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,33,nrWiersza,Replace(CStr(oRS("k_strnip")),"-",""),"black",false,10 pojElement pExcel,40,nrWiersza,"*","black",false,10
end sub
sub pojWiersz_2013_txt(byval iWiersz, byval oRS, byval oSO)
oSO.write "64087" + vbTab 'A oSO.write CStr(oRS("produkt_indeks")) + vbTab 'B oSO.write CStr(oRS("produkt_indeks")) + vbTab 'C oSO.write CStr(oRS("produkt_nazwa")) + vbTab 'D oSO.write "" + vbTab 'E oSO.write doc_.afc.display.money(oRS("sprzed_ilosc"),"") + vbTab 'F if ccur(oRS("zakup_kurs")) = ccur(0.0) then oSO.write doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(0.0), "") + vbTab 'G else oSO.write doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(oRS("zakup_wart_netto")) * ccur(oRS("sprzed_ilosc"))/ccur(oRS("zakup_kurs")), "") + vbTab 'G end if if ccur(oRS("sprzed_kurs")) = ccur(0.0) then oSO.write doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(0.0),"") + vbTab 'H else oSO.write doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(oRS("sprzed_wart_netto"))/ccur(oRS("sprzed_kurs")),"") + vbTab 'H end if oSO.write "EUR" + vbTab 'I oSO.write CStr(oRS("klient_nip")) + vbTab 'J oSO.write CStr(oRS("klient_nazw")) + vbTab 'K oSO.write CStr(oRS("klient_adres")) + vbTab 'L oSO.write "PL" + vbTab 'M oSO.write CStr(oRS("klient_kod")) + vbTab 'N oSO.write CStr(oRS("klient_miasto")) + vbTab 'O oSO.write "PL" + Replace(Replace(CStr(oRS("klient_nip")),"-",""),"PL","") + vbTab 'P oSO.write "" + vbTab 'Q = CStr(oRS("egz_nr")) oSO.write "" + vbTab 'R oSO.write conData(CStr(oRS("sprzed_datawyst"))) + vbTab 'S
oSO.write "" + vbTab 'T oSO.write "" + vbTab 'U oSO.write "" + vbTab 'V oSO.write "" + vbTab 'W oSO.write "" + vbTab 'X oSO.write "" + vbTab 'Y oSO.write "" + vbTab 'Z oSO.write "" + vbTab 'AA oSO.write "" + vbTab 'AB
oSO.write "SO" + vbTab 'AC oSO.write "*" + vbTab 'AD
oSO.write vbCrLf end sub
sub naglowek_2014_txt(byval oSO) oSO.write "CUSTNO" + vbTab oSO.write "SAPMATNO" + vbTab oSO.write "MATNO" + vbTab oSO.write "MATDESC" + vbTab oSO.write "STOCKDATE" + vbTab oSO.write "STOCK" + vbTab oSO.write "OPENORDERBROTHER" + vbTab oSO.write "OPENORDERCUSTOMER" + vbTab oSO.write "RECORDEND" oSO.write vbCrLf end sub
sub pojWiersz_2014_txt(byval oRS, byval oSO) oSO.write "64087" + vbTab oSO.write CStr(oRS("produkt_indeks")) + vbTab oSO.write CStr(oRS("produkt_indeks")) + vbTab oSO.write CStr(oRS("produkt_nazwa")) + vbTab if iRaportVersion = 3 then oSO.write conData(CStr(g_oParamArray.Value(0).first_value)) + vbTab else oSO.write conData(CStr(g_oParamArray.Value(0).last_value)) + vbTab end if oSO.write CStr(CLng(oRS("ilosc_magazyn"))) + vbTab oSO.write CStr(CLng(oRS("ilosc_zam_wlasne"))) + vbTab oSO.write CStr(CLng(oRS("ilosc_zam_obce"))) + vbTab oSO.write "*" oSO.write vbCrLf end sub
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'procedura tworzy pojedyczną komórkę w Excelu (teks, kolor, pogrubienie) '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- sub pojElement(byval pExcel, byval x, byval y, byval strText, byval strColor, byval bBold, byval iFontSize) pExcel.InsertValueXY x, y, strText pExcel.MakeBoldXY x, y, bBold pExcel.SetTextSize x, y, iFontSize if strColor = "red" then pExcel.SetTextColor x, y, RGB(255,0,0) else if strColor = "blue" then pExcel.SetTextColor x, y, RGB(0,0,255) else if strColor = "black" then pExcel.SetTextColor x, y, RGB(0,0,0) end if end if end if end sub
'--------------------------------------------------- 'funkcja zamiany daty np. 2008-05-23 => 23/05/2008 '--------------------------------------------------- function conData(byval strData) if iRaportVersion = 2 or iRaportVersion = 3 then conData = " " + Mid(strData,9,2) + "." + Mid(strData,6,2) + "." + Mid(strData,1,4) else conData = " " + Mid(strData,9,2) + "/" + Mid(strData,6,2) + "/" + Mid(strData,1,4) end if end function
